description: 7 agents registered in agent_registry.json have no dedicated directory (ViewPoint-init, SecurityTriage-00, AgentReview-00, QualityControl-00, StandardsGuard-00, Code-B-iSmuth-00, Code-B-Tsted-00). Only FocalPoint-null-00 and koe-RumA-00 have agent directories. Creating dedicated folders would allow per-agent config, README, and runtime state files.
title: Create agent directories for 7 registry-only agents
